description: Paginate or columnate FILE(s) for printing.

option.name: --across
tip: Print columns across rather than down, used together with -COLUMN.

option.name: --columns
tip: Output COLUMN columns and print columns down, unless -a is used.
Balance number of lines in the columns on each page.

option.name: --date-format
tip: Use FORMAT for the header date.

option.name: --expand-tabs
tip: Expand input CHARs (TABs) to tab WIDTH (8).

option.name: --first-line-number
tip: Start counting with NUMBER at 1st line of first page printed.

option.name: --form-feed
tip: Use form feeds instead of newlines to separate pages.

option.name: --header
tip: Use a centered HEADER instead of filename in page header.
-h "" prints a blank line, don't use -h"".

option.name: --indent
tip: Offset each line with MARGIN (zero) spaces.

option.name: --join-lines
tip: Merge full lines, turns off -W line truncation, no column alignment.

option.name: --length
tip: Set the page length to PAGE_LENGTH (66) lines.

option.name: --merge
tip: Print all files in parallel, one in each column.

option.name: --no-file-warnings
tip: Omit warning when a file cannot be opened.

option.name: --number-lines
tip: Number lines, use DIGITS (5) digits, then SEP (TAB).

option.name: --omit-pagination
tip: Omit page headers and trailers, eliminate any pagination by form feeds.

option.name: --output-tabs
tip: Replace spaces with CHARs (TABs) to tab WIDTH (8).

option.name: --page-width
tip: Set page width to PAGE_WIDTH (72) characters always.

option.name: --separator
tip: Separate columns by a single character.

option.name: --show-control-chars
tip: Use hat notation (^G) and octal backslash notation.

option.name: --width
tip: Set page width to PAGE_WIDTH (72) characters for multiple text-column output only.
